mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_api_log (id, user_id, username, module, api_path, method, request_method, success, error_message, duration_ms, ip_address, request_time, response_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{username}, #{module}, #{apiPath}, #{method}, #{requestMethod}, #{success}, #{errorMessage}, #{durationMs}, #{ipAddress}, #{requestTime}, #{responseTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_api_log WHERE request_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}
SELECT AVG(duration_ms) FROM t_api_log WHERE request_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(request_time, '%H:00') as hour, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(CASE WHEN success = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as successCount FROM t_api_log WHERE request_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(request_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00') ORDER BY hour
SELECT COALESCE(module, 'OTHER') as module, COUNT(*) as count FROM t_api_log WHERE request_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY module ORDER BY count DESC
